name: Clam
long_description:
Every startup founder wants to 10x their non-technical teams with AI, but they do not have time to decide what to automate, build the workflows, and fix them when they break.

Clam is an AI integration engineer for startup employees. Our desktop app uses local models to analyze work already on your computer, identify repetitive tasks, generate the workflow in code, and run it in the cloud. No more drag and drop. 

When software changes cause workflows to fail, Clam repairs them automatically using our secure implementation of OpenClaw. It can write tests, run experiments, update the automation scripts, and even text you for more information. 

Startups want to focus on the outcome of the automation, not the automation itself. We give each use case a dynamic UI that lets you visualize the output in the best way possible for you. 

How are we keeping our OpenClaw secure? Our system runs a series of scans at the network level to scrutinize every piece of data leaving and entering your system. Each message is scanned for personal info leaks, prompt injection attempts, and malicious code, and custom policies.
one_liner: Self-fixing automations for fast-moving startups built on OpenClaw
